info.title: АСОУ ПД Пульс API
info.description:
REST API for the АСОУ ПД Пульс application providing user management and authentication.

Error contract: most failures return { error: <code> }. Validation errors return { error: "validation_error", details: [{ field, code }] }.

RateLimited.description: Too Many Requests (rate limit exceeded — may be enforced by API or upstream DDoS protection)

200.description: New access token. Requires a valid HTTP-only refresh cookie.
Password changed and new tokens issued

get.summary: Clear legacy/broken auth and CSRF cookies

post.summary: Create bank account for current user
Request bank details change (creates ticket + statement)

get.summary: Detailed structure of sport school staff for a club
List staff assigned to a club

patch.summary: Update staff position within a club

post.summary: Find bank by BIC or name
Create INN record for current user
Reconcile penalties (Нарушение) for a match from external DB

400.description: Match is not mapped to external or preconditions missing

get.summary: List penalties for a match (ordered by period/time)

403.description: Forbidden for non-participants (non-admin), or disabled for non-current double protocol matches

200.description: Neutral response to avoid account enumeration

get.summary: List all referees with their group

post.summary: Send email code for sign type selection

get.summary: List users with their sign types

post.summary: Select sign type for current user
Create SNILS record for current user

get.summary: List club/team assignments with staff overview

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by club or team name

parameters.name: has_staff
parameters.description: Filter by presence of staff on a team

200.description: Paginated items with club, team and staff

get.summary: List staff assigned to a team
Get current user's sport school links overview (clubs/teams)

201.description: Created user with invitation delivery status

post.summary: Re-send admin invitation email with a new temporary password
Add club to user (sport school staff)

get.summary: Get user's sport school links overview

get.description:
Validates a signed verification token embedded in a document QR and returns
public confirmation details if valid. No authentication required.
